expectations.text: execution-status.md artifact is created and tracks all 3 subtasks
expectations.evidence: execution-status.md exists at outputs/execution-status.md and contains a table tracking ST-1, ST-2, and ST-3, all with status 'done'. Includes status summary showing 3 done, 0 in other states.

expectations.text: ST-1: migrations/002_sso.up.sql created with tenant_sso_config table and users.keycloak_id column
expectations.evidence: codebase/migrations/002_sso.up.sql exists with CREATE TABLE tenant_sso_config (9 columns: id BIGSERIAL PK, tenant_id BIGINT NOT NULL FK, idp_entity_id, idp_sso_url, idp_certificate, sp_entity_id, enabled BOOLEAN, created_at, updated_at) plus CREATE INDEX and ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN keycloak_id TEXT UNIQUE.

expectations.text: ST-1: migrations/002_sso.down.sql created with reverse operations
expectations.evidence: codebase/migrations/002_sso.down.sql exists with three statements in correct reverse order: ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS keycloak_id, DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_tenant_sso_config_tenant_id, DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tenant_sso_config.

expectations.text: ST-2: config/config.go modified to include SSOConfig struct with Keycloak fields
expectations.evidence: codebase/config/config.go contains SSOConfig struct with 6 fields (KeycloakURL, KeycloakRealm, KeycloakAdminUser, KeycloakAdminPassword, SAMLCallbackURL, SPEntityID). Config struct includes SSO SSOConfig field. Load() populates all fields via getEnv() with appropriate env var names and fallback values.

expectations.text: ST-3: internal/tenant/model.go modified to include TenantSSOConfig struct
expectations.evidence: codebase/internal/tenant/model.go contains TenantSSOConfig struct with 9 fields (ID, TenantID, IdPEntityID, IdPSSOURL, IdPCertificate, SPEntityID, Enabled, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt) all with appropriate JSON tags. Existing Tenant struct preserved unchanged.

expectations.text: ST-3: internal/user/model.go modified to include KeycloakID *string field
expectations.evidence: codebase/internal/user/model.go User struct contains 'KeycloakID *string `json:"keycloak_id,omitempty"`' at line 11. All existing fields (ID, Email, Password, TenantID, Role, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt) preserved unchanged.

expectations.text: Task review was performed for each subtask (task-reviewer agent was spawned)
expectations.evidence: Three task review files exist in outputs/reviews/: st1-task-review.md (verdict: TASK_REVIEW_PASSED), st2-task-review.md (verdict: TASK_REVIEW_PASSED), st3-task-review.md (verdict: TASK_REVIEW_PASSED). Each contains detailed criteria evaluation tables and completion criteria checklists.

expectations.text: Code review was performed for each subtask (code-reviewer agent was spawned)
expectations.evidence: Three code review files exist in outputs/reviews/: st1-code-review.md (verdict: CODE_REVIEW_PASSED), st2-code-review.md (verdict: CODE_REVIEW_PASSED), st3-code-review.md (verdict: CODE_REVIEW_PASSED). Each contains correctness, quality, pattern adherence, regression risk, test coverage, and security evaluations.

expectations.text: task-completion-log.md is created with completion records for all 3 subtasks
expectations.evidence: outputs/task-completion-log.md exists with header 'Total completions: 3 of 3' and detailed records for ST-1, ST-2, and ST-3. Each record includes completion date, review cycles, rework rounds, key changes, unblocked items, and notes.
